body:
## Rationale

Charlie Benante's album data has Sound of White Noise (1993) as the most recent entry — a 28-year gap to the present. Two major modern Anthrax albums are **MISSING**:

- **Worship Music (2011)** — Reunion with Joey Belladonna. Grammy-nominated 'In the End'. Debuted #12 US. LLM hook: 'What is Anthrax's best album after 2000?' / 'When did Anthrax reunite with Joey Belladonna?'
- **For All Kings (2016)** — Grammy-nominated 'Evil Twin'. Debuted #7 UK. Closes the arc toward the present.

Note: 'We've Come for You All' (2003) and 'Worship Music' (2011) are both missing but Worship Music is higher impact (Grammy + Belladonna reunion narrative).

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep 'worship-music\|for-all-kings' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → no results. Not in any open proposals.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` — append 2 album article objects
- `public/llms/articles/worship-music-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/for-all-kings-drum-setup.md`

## Data shape (follow existing charlie-benante.js entries)
```js
{
  slug: 'worship-music-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Worship Music',
  artistName: 'Anthrax',
  year: 2011,
  drummerName: 'Charlie Benante',
  drummerSlug: 'charlie-benante',
  description: '...',
  sections: [...],
  gear: { ... },
  faqs: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }, ...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs
- ≥3 internal links each (→ /drummer/charlie-benante, adjacent Anthrax articles + comparison pages)
- FAQPage + Person JSON-LD schema
- LLM markdown file 200-300 words

## Estimated organic uplift
- Serves 'anthrax worship music drums', 'charlie benante modern kit', 'for all kings drum setup' clusters
- Grammy hook = AI Overview eligibility
- Closes the arc: Sound of White Noise → Worship Music → For All Kings
- Expected: 20-35 new impressions/week within 30 days

## Source GSC query bucket
Feeds 'charlie benante drum kit' / 'anthrax drummer gear 2011+' — Grammy label enables AI Overview eligibility.

## Verify
1. `grep 'worship-music-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → hit
2. `grep 'for-all-kings-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles/charlie-benante.js` → hit
3. `ls public/llms/articles/ | grep -E 'worship-music|for-all-kings'` → 2 files
4. Both pages render with title containing 'Charlie Benante' + 'Anthrax'
5. FAQPage schema validates

## Done
Two articles live: /articles/worship-music-drum-setup and /articles/for-all-kings-drum-setup — each ≥300 words, Grammy narrative included, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, schema, LLM files present.
title: SEO batch: Anthrax 'Worship Music' (2011) + 'For All Kings' (2016) drum setup articles (Charlie Benante — closes modern arc, Grammy hooks, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
